side_effects.description: Injection site reactions (ISRs) are a common reason researchers abandon GHK-Cu studies; created a protocol specifically to minimize painful ISRs

protocol_notes: Claims to have created one of the original GHK-Cu protocols called 'Anela Protocols', focused on painless GHK-Cu administration. Protocol is 6 weeks on, 3 weeks off (break optional, taken due to copper accumulation concerns). Emphasizes daily dosing is essential given short ~30-minute half-life. GHK-Cu is not a secretagogue so no days-off within the week are needed. Specific injection technique used to prevent painful ISRs.
